channel.title: Intellissh on 路飞博客
channel.description: Recent content in Intellissh on 路飞博客

item.title: 一款带 AI 大脑的 Web SSH 工具
item.description: 项目：https://github.com/clusterzx/intellissh 安装 mkdir -p /opt/docker/intellissh && cd /opt/docker/intellissh 创建docker-compose.yml nano docker-compose.yml 粘贴 services: intellissh: image: clusterzx/intellissh:latest container_name: intellissh ports: - "8080:3000" volumes: - ./data:/app/server/data restart: unless-stopped 启动 docker compose up -d 查看用户名和密码 docker logs intellissh
